'''banuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enaliornithid|enaliornithid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enaliornithid|enaliornithid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| banuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæniwith|bæniwith]] || [[word:bæniwij|bæniwij]] || [[word:bæniwish|bæniwish]] || [[word:bæniwi|bæniwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:banunuwuth|banunuwuth]] || [[word:banunuwuj|banunuwuj]] || [[word:banunuwush|banunuwush]] || [[word:banunuwu|banunuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:banuwuth|banuwuth]] || [[word:banuwuj|banuwuj]] || [[word:banuwush|banuwush]] || [[word:banuwu|banuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:banufwuth|banufwuth]] || [[word:banufwuj|banufwuj]] || [[word:banufwush|banufwush]] || [[word:banufwuf|banufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banuwuthu|banuwuthu]] || [[word:banuwuju|banuwuju]] || [[word:banuwushu|banuwushu]] || [[word:banuwuku|banuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banuwuth|banuwuth]] || [[word:banuwuj|banuwuj]] || [[word:banuwush|banuwush]] || [[word:banuwu|banuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banuwuthul|banuwuthul]] || [[word:banuwujul|banuwujul]] || [[word:banuwushul|banuwushul]] || [[word:banuwukul|banuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banuwuthuthu|banuwuthuthu]] || [[word:banuwujuju|banuwujuju]] || [[word:banuwushushu|banuwushushu]] || [[word:banuwuku|banuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banuwuthun|banuwuthun]] || [[word:banuwujun|banuwujun]] || [[word:banuwushun|banuwushun]] || [[word:banuwukun|banuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banuwuthuoro|banuwuthuoro]] || [[word:banuwujuoro|banuwujuoro]] || [[word:banuwushuoro|banuwushuoro]] || [[word:banuwukuoro|banuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
